professional_summary.en: Sara is a frontend developer and recent graduate of King Saud University with hands-on experience building responsive, accessible web interfaces. She combines strong JavaScript fundamentals with a keen eye for UI polish, and is looking to grow into a full-stack role at a fast-moving Saudi tech company.
professional_summary.ar: سارة مطورة واجهات أمامية وخريجة حديثة من جامعة الملك سعود، لديها خبرة عملية في بناء واجهات ويب متجاوبة وسهلة الاستخدام. تجمع بين أساسيات قوية في جافاسكريبت وحس عالٍ في تفاصيل الواجهة، وتتطلع للنمو نحو دور متكامل (فرونت وباك) في شركة تقنية سعودية سريعة النمو.

achievements: Capstone project: accessible e-commerce UI kit

experience.description: Handled customer service and point-of-sale operations in a high-traffic retail environment.
achievements: Consistently exceeded monthly sales targets by 15%
Trained 4 new hires on POS systems and inventory workflows

experience.description: Building and maintaining responsive React interfaces for client marketing sites.
achievements: Rebuilt a legacy jQuery site in React, cutting load time by 40%
Introduced a shared component library used across 3 client projects

projects.name: Accessible E-commerce UI Kit
projects.description: A component library focused on WCAG AA compliance for Arabic/English e-commerce storefronts.
highlights: Used by 2 bootcamp cohorts as a teaching reference

volunteer_work: Code club mentor for high-school girls, Misk Foundation, 2022-2023
